title: Call for Speakers | Optimized AI Conference

headings.text: Delivering Tangible Business Value With AI
Learn from Those Deploying Production Use Cases
Understanding the Business Context of the Use Case
Bring Technical and Non-Technical Folks to Learn in One Place

body_text.text: SPEAKER APPLICATION - CLOSED
The program schedule is now available, and all submitted talks will be considered for waitlisted talks
All talks are in-person. Virtual talks are not available.
No travel and lodging provided for speakers.

An Optimized AI (OAI) speaker is a collaborative professional who seeks to share their extensive knowledge and insights in AI and data science. They come from top companies, both well-known and emerging and are eager to engage with the community. Our speakers excel in presenting the latest languages, tools, and models used in AI for business applications. Since its inception, the Optimized AI Conference (previously the Southern Data Science Conference) has showcased the significant contributions of its presenters, ensuring that attendees experience top-quality talks, workshops, and training sessions.
Three priorities for the conference program:

Learn from Those Deploying Production Use Cases - Our speakers provide insights into real-world applications of AI, sharing their experiences and best practices in deploying AI solutions in production environments.

Understanding the Business Context of the Use Case - We emphasize the importance of understanding the business implications and context of AI use cases. Our speakers bridge the gap between technical and business perspectives, ensuring that attendees gain a holistic view of AI's impact.

Bring Technical and Non-Technical Folks to Learn in One Place - The OAI Conference aims to be an inclusive learning environment where both technical and non-technical participants can engage, learn, and collaborate. Our diverse lineup of speakers ensures a comprehensive learning experience for all attendees.
Align with a high-caliber audience of people generating revenue with AI
Less concurrent sessions means a larger audience per talk
Speaker endorsements, recording collateral. See previous conference talks (YouTube link)

GreenCard Reference Letters (if applicable) - A number of our previous speakers were awarded their visas by participating in our event. The founders of the event are both immigrants, so we resonate with folks going through the visa process
Vibe and deeper connections with attendees. OAIC is not a massive conference. We focus on having a meaningful size audience to maximize connections and value transfer.
November 7, 2025
Conference Talk - 10, 15, 20, 25 minutes depending on the segment
Conference Tutorial/Workshop - 45 - 120 minutes. This is a longer form of in-depth talk. Let us know if hands-on is required.
Focus on the talk's outcome, the technologies highlighted, and the challenges solved. A bit of context to the use case can help. Keep it to less than 500 words.
Assign a category based on the following rubric:
Learner (little to no knowledge)
Proficient (familiar, adding knowledge)
Expert (Deep dive into use-case)
If this talk is already available online with an 90% overlap, then we will reject your submission.

Absolutely, there should be no product pitches at any point. If you are focused on a Sponsored Speaking Slot, we expect you to educate the audience and share information about your product at the end. However, more than 90% of your talk must be product-agnostic if a service or product is being sold.
Once again, regardless of your sponsorship package, we are committed to no sales pitches.

If we determine that your talk is from a company that offers a data science product or service, we may direct you to a sponsorship package that would be appropriate to align your product with the audience.

footer.text: Content: Home, Speakers, Workshops, Program, Contact Us | Join our newsletter | Subscribe to our newsletter and get notified for future events. | 23 Lilac Dr, Warren, NJ 07059 | +1 (641) 455-6100 | (c) Optimized AI Conference 2024 | Registration

metadata.description: The Optimized AI Conference invites speaker proposals on AI topics like LLMs and RAG, Agents, and deploying models at scale.
